title: Add native contact sheet generator for image mining and LoRA review
operator_request: CKC/Ingest should create flexible contact sheets with DPI, rows, columns, and export settings for visually inspecting mined images.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: Build contact sheets as native export artifacts tied to Ingest review sets and CKC albums.

scope.summary: Generate contact sheets from Ingest/CKC image sets with controlled layout and export receipts.
base_scope: Select images from an ingest review set, CKC album, or character media set.
Configure DPI, rows, columns, thumbnail fit, labels, and output path.
Generate/export contact sheet artifacts with lineage metadata.
Make the preview and export controls Argus-inspectable.
Update internal UserManual with contact sheet workflow.
acceptance_criteria: A contact sheet can be generated from a selected image set.
Rows, columns, and DPI affect output layout.
Export produces a receipt linking back to source image IDs.
Argus can inspect and steer the contact sheet controls.
verification: Image/layout tests for contact sheet generation.
Native UI tests for controls and preview.
